zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Vere於大約1200年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Walter de Vere18歲，母親Sibel de Kyme16歲。他和Ada Bertram至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1270年9月3日之前在英國越可爾斯普洛阿特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Vere was born about 1200, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter de Vere, was 18 and his mother, Sibel de Kyme, was 16. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Ada Bertram. He died before 3 September 1270, in Sproatley, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Vere est né environ 1200, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter de Vere, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Sibel de Kyme, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Ada Bertram. Il est décédé avant 3 septembre 1270, à Sproatley, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Vere(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Vere(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibel de Kyme(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Ada Bertram(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1270년 9월 3일 이전 영국 요르크실르 스플로틀리에서 사망했다.
